channel.title: Elegant Stitches by Sonia on Elegant Stitches by Sonia | Bridal & Formalwear
channel.description: Recent content in Elegant Stitches by Sonia on Elegant Stitches by Sonia | Bridal & Formalwear

item.title: About
item.description: About Elegant Stitches by Sonia At Elegant Stitches by Sonia, I bring dreams to life through custom-designed bridal and formalwear. As a dedicated seamstress with a passion for craftsmanship and detail, I specialize in creating one-of-a-kind wedding dresses, perfectly tailored gowns, and personalized alterations that celebrate your unique style and silhouette. Whether you’re walking down the aisle or attending a special event, my goal is to make you feel confident, comfortable, and beautifully you.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Contact I’d love to hear about your vision for your special day or event. Whether you’re interested in a custom design, need alterations, or just have questions about my services, please don’t hesitate to reach out. Consultation Requests To schedule a consultation, please fill out the form below or call directly. Initial consultations are $75 (applied to your service when booked) and typically last about 60 minutes. Full Name * Email Address * Phone Number Interested In * Please select.

item.title: Services
item.description: Services At Elegant Stitches by Sonia, I offer a comprehensive range of services to ensure you look and feel your absolute best for your special day or formal event. Custom Bridal Gowns Transform your wedding dress dreams into reality with a completely custom-designed gown tailored to your unique style, body shape, and wedding theme. Full Custom Design: From concept to creation, a dress designed specifically for you Semi-Custom Design: Modify existing designs to create your perfect look Timeline: 6-9 months recommended for custom gowns Process: Includes concept consultation, fabric selection, multiple fittings, and final detailing Pricing: Starting at $1,800, varies based on design complexity and materials Bridal Alterations Expert alterations to make your purchased wedding dress fit you perfectly.
